name: AIR T INC
summary: Air T, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated holding company operating in four segments: Overnight Air Cargo (MAC, CSA, WASI providing FedEx feeder cargo services); Ground Support Equipment (GGS manufacturing aircraft deicers, lifts, tow tractors); Commercial Aircraft, Engines and Parts (Contrail, AirCo, Worthington, Jet Yard managing/leasing aviation assets, parts sales, disassembly); and Digital Solutions (Delphax, Shanwick, WACD providing digital aviation subscription services). FedEx contracts represent approximately 39% of consolidated revenue.
